question_text: Which of the following is not emphasized in a production possibility curve?
option_c: Inefficiency in the use of resources
explanation: A PPC illustrates scarcity, choice, and efficiency/inefficiency—not long-run “development.”

question_text: Which of the following NOT among the objectives of OPEC?
option_a: to stabilize the price of oil in the world market
option_b: to established petroleum refineries in all member state
option_c: to stabilize the revenue from oil to producing countries
option_d: to make sure that oil flows to all the consuming countries
explanation: OPEC coordinates policies; building refineries in every member state isn’t a core objective.

question_text: A market situation with few sellers and many buyers is called
explanation: Few sellers = oligopoly (duopoly is a special case of two sellers).
By definition, the marginal propensity to consume plus save equals 1.

question_text: Producers operating in a free market economy are more efficient as a result of
option_c: the very few number of participants
explanation: Competition pressures firms to be efficient and innovative.
